summary: Storyteller-system d10 dice pool. Pool = Attribute + Ability. Each die meeting or beating the Storyteller's difficulty is one success (default difficulty 6, varies 6-9). Botch on any roll showing zero successes AND at least one 1. Specialty bonus on rolls within the chosen specialty: each natural 10 is rerolled. Willpower spend = one automatic guaranteed success, max once per turn.

resolution.poolFormula: Attribute + Ability (+ specialty 10-rerolls when applicable, + Willpower auto-success once/turn, + Discipline rating dice)

Trivial.description: Trivial for a competent character. Often waived.

Standard.description: V20 default. Average task under normal conditions.

Challenging.description: Pushes a competent character; pressure or distraction.

Difficult.description: Few succeed without bonuses or supernatural help.

Nigh-Impossible.description: Heroic; requires Willpower, Disciplines, or aid.

attributes.name: Strength
attributes.description: Raw muscle. Lifting, melee damage, brawling pools.

attributes.name: Dexterity
attributes.description: Agility, hand-eye coordination, attack accuracy, dodging.

attributes.name: Stamina
attributes.description: Endurance, soak (bashing/lethal), resisting fatigue and damage.

attributes.name: Charisma
attributes.description: Force of personality, sincere charm, leadership presence.

attributes.name: Manipulation
attributes.description: Deceit, guile, indirect influence, getting others to act against their interest.

attributes.name: Appearance
attributes.description: Beauty / presence; affects attraction, intimidation by allure, first-impression rolls.

attributes.name: Perception
attributes.description: Spotting, hearing, noticing details and changes in environment.

attributes.name: Wits
attributes.description: Reaction speed, on-the-fly thinking, initiative pool component.

skills.name: Alertness
skills.description: Talent. Notice danger and details. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.description: Talent. Climbing, running, jumping, swimming. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Awareness
skills.description: Talent (V20). Sense supernatural presence and disturbances in the Beast. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Brawl
skills.description: Talent. Unarmed combat; punches, grapples, claw strikes. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Empathy
skills.description: Talent. Read emotions, sense lies of the heart. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Expression
skills.description: Talent. Communicating ideas, art, oratory, written prose. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.description: Talent. Threats, looming presence, breaking will. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Leadership
skills.description: Talent. Inspiring loyalty, giving orders, rallying. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Streetwise
skills.description: Talent. Navigating urban underbelly, contacts, fences, gossip. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Subterfuge
skills.description: Talent. Lying, misleading, deflecting questions. Usable untrained at +1 difficulty.

skills.name: Animal Ken
skills.description: Skill. Handling and training animals (a vampire's natural problem). Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Crafts
skills.description: Skill. Build, repair, and make physical things by hand. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Drive
skills.description: Skill. Operate vehicles under stress. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Etiquette
skills.description: Skill. Manners, protocol, the unwritten rules of Kindred and mortal society. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Firearms
skills.description: Skill. Handguns, rifles, automatic weapons. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Larceny
skills.description: Skill (V20). Lock-picking, sleight of hand, B&E, forgery. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Melee
skills.description: Skill. Armed close combat; blades, clubs, improvised. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Performance
skills.description: Skill. Singing, instrument, acting, dance — the art of performing for an audience. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.description: Skill. Move unseen and unheard. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Survival
skills.description: Skill. Wilderness travel, foraging, weather. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Academics
skills.description: Knowledge. History, literature, languages, the humanities. Untrained: cannot roll without source material.

skills.name: Computer
skills.description: Knowledge. Software, hardware, networks. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Finance
skills.description: Knowledge. Money, markets, accounting, business law. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Investigation
skills.description: Knowledge. Forensic technique, evidence-handling, deduction. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Law
skills.description: Knowledge. Statute, precedent, courtroom procedure, criminal law. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Medicine
skills.description: Knowledge. Diagnosis, surgery, pharmacology — and what blood reveals. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Occult
skills.description: Knowledge. Lore of the supernatural — vampires, mages, ghosts, the Antediluvians. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Politics
skills.description: Knowledge. Government, faction, who-owes-whom in mortal AND Kindred society. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Science
skills.description: Knowledge. Physics, chemistry, biology — the natural sciences. Untrained: cannot roll.

skills.name: Technology
skills.description: Knowledge. Engineering, electronics, modern infrastructure. Untrained: cannot roll.

derivedStats.name: Generation
derivedStats.formula: Player-set; default 13th. Lower generation costs Background dots at character creation. Bounds the Blood Pool max and the per-turn Blood spend cap (see Generation Table lorebook entry).

derivedStats.name: Blood Pool
derivedStats.formula: Player-set max keyed to Generation (13th=10, 12th=11, 11th=12, 10th=13, 9th=14, 8th=15, 7th=20, 6th=30, 5th=40, 4th=50). Spent for healing, Discipline activation, blushing of life, Physical Attribute boost (cap = generation per-turn limit).

derivedStats.name: Willpower
derivedStats.formula: Current/permanent. Max 10. Spend 1 for one automatic success on a single action (max once/turn) or to ignore wound penalties for one turn or to resist Frenzy/derangement triggers. Permanent rating regen +1 per significant scene; current refreshes at full per night's sleep up to permanent.

derivedStats.name: Humanity
derivedStats.formula: 0-10. Sin-hierarchy: lose a dot when you commit an act at or below your current rating without a successful Conscience roll. Most humans sit 6-7. Below 5 is monstrous; 0 is wight.

derivedStats.name: Path Rating
derivedStats.formula: 0-10. Use INSTEAD of Humanity if the character is on a Path of Enlightenment. Mechanically identical hierarchy of sins; the act-list differs per Path. Default 0 (= no Path; Humanity is in use).

derivedStats.name: Conscience
derivedStats.formula: 1-5. Standard Virtue (Humanity track). Resists doing acts that would cost Humanity. Replaced by Conviction on a Path of Enlightenment.

derivedStats.name: Self-Control
derivedStats.formula: 1-5. Standard Virtue (Humanity track). Resists Frenzy. Replaced by Instinct on a Path of Enlightenment.

derivedStats.name: Courage
derivedStats.formula: 1-5. Resists Rotschreck (the Red Fear) and shoring up against fear-based effects. Used by both Humanity AND Path characters. Note: when rolling Virtues, the dice cap at the character's Humanity/Path rating, not the Virtue rating.

derivedStats.name: Animalism
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Beast-bond and primal command. Powers per dot are listed in the lorebook entry 'Discipline: Animalism'.

derivedStats.name: Auspex
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Heightened senses and supernatural perception. Powers per dot in the lorebook.

derivedStats.name: Celerity
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Vampiric speed; spend 1 Blood per turn for that many extra physical actions (= Celerity rating).

derivedStats.name: Dominate
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Mind control via eye contact and the imperative voice. Powers per dot in the lorebook.

derivedStats.name: Fortitude
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Each dot adds one die to soak rolls and lets the vampire soak even AGGRAVATED damage (fire, sunlight, supernatural claws). The only widely-available defense against aggravated.

derivedStats.name: Obfuscate
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. The art of being unseen, unheard, unremembered. Powers per dot in the lorebook.

derivedStats.name: Potence
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Vampiric strength; each dot grants ONE automatic success on Strength-based feats and brawl/melee damage rolls.

derivedStats.name: Presence
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. The supernatural force of personality — magnetism, awe, dread. Powers per dot in the lorebook.

derivedStats.name: Protean
derivedStats.formula: Common Discipline 0-5. Bodily transformation rooted in Beast and earth; signature of the Gangrel.

derivedStats.name: Necromancy
derivedStats.formula: Clan-unique Discipline (Giovanni and Hecata-adjacent). Path/Ritual structure parallel to Thaumaturgy. See lorebook for paths and rituals.

derivedStats.name: Thaumaturgy
derivedStats.formula: Clan-unique Discipline (Tremere). Path/Ritual structure: pick a primary Path rated 1-5, learn other Paths at 1 dot each, plus Rituals as separate spells. See lorebook.

derivedStats.name: Vicissitude
derivedStats.formula: Clan-unique Discipline (Tzimisce; Sabbat-taught). Active fleshcrafting and bonecrafting. See lorebook for power tree.

derivedStats.name: Initiative
derivedStats.formula: (Dexterity + Wits) + 1d10 each combat round. Wound penalties subtract from rating, NOT from the d10.

derivedStats.name: Health Track
derivedStats.formula: 7 V20 health levels: -0 / -1 / -1 / -2 / -2 / -5 / Incapacitated. Penalty in effect equals the highest filled box and applies to dice pools (Willpower spend ignores it for one turn). Damage types: Bashing (B, severity 0), Lethal (L, severity 1), Aggravated (A, severity 2 — only Fortitude soaks it).

damageTypes.label: B
damageTypes.description: Blunt or non-lethal damage. Soaked with Stamina. Heals quickly (one level per hour with Blood spend, or naturally over a night).

damageTypes.label: L
damageTypes.description: Edged, piercing, or gunshot. Soaked with Stamina + Fortitude. Heals slower; one level per night with Blood spend.

damageTypes.label: A
damageTypes.description: Fire, sunlight, supernatural claws/fangs, magic. ONLY Fortitude soaks it. Heals very slowly; one level per five nights with full daily blood expenditure.

derivedStats.name: Soak (Bashing)
derivedStats.formula: Stamina + armor B-soak. Soak rolls cannot botch.

derivedStats.name: Soak (Lethal)
derivedStats.formula: Stamina + Fortitude + armor L-soak.

derivedStats.name: Soak (Aggravated)
derivedStats.formula: Fortitude + supernatural soak only. Mortal armor and Stamina do NOT soak aggravated.

values.label: Humanity
values.description: Default morality. Use Conscience + Self-Control as Virtues; sin-hierarchy is the V20 standard chart.

values.label: Path of Honorable Accord
values.description: Sabbat / knightly Path. Use Conviction + Self-Control as Virtues. Loyalty, oath-keeping, hospitality.

values.label: Path of Caine
values.description: Sabbat scholar Path. Use Conviction + Instinct. Caine as the only legitimate model; meditate, study, transcend.

values.label: Path of the Beast
values.description: Sabbat / Gangrel-adjacent Path. Use Conviction + Instinct. The Beast is truth; suppression is the lie.

values.label: Path of Night
values.description: Lasombra Path. Use Conviction + Instinct (or Conviction + Self-Control on the 'Cold' variant). Vampires as God's instruments of damnation; teach via suffering.

values.label: Calm
values.description: Beast contained. Normal action and roleplay.

values.label: Ride the Wave
values.description: Player is intentionally riding the Beast — limited steering via Self-Control / Instinct rolls. Some control retained.

values.label: Frenzy (Hunger)
values.description: Lost to hunger. Drive: kill and feed. Cannot use focused Disciplines, ignores wound penalties, will not respect Masquerade.

values.label: Frenzy (Anger)
values.description: Lost to rage. Drive: destroy the source of provocation. Same restrictions as Hunger Frenzy.

values.label: Rotschreck (Red Fear)
values.description: Beast in panic from fire / sunlight / overwhelming threat. Drive: flee mindlessly, smashing obstacles. Resist with Courage alone.

values.label: Sated
values.description: Blood Pool comfortably above (7 - Self-Control or Instinct). Beast quiet.

values.label: Hungry
values.description: Blood Pool < (7 - Self-Control). Self-Control die pool capped at current Blood Pool for Frenzy resistance. The Beast pays attention.

values.label: Starving
values.description: Blood Pool 1 or less. Frenzy at the slightest provocation; collapse imminent if pool reaches 0.

diceTagFormat.example: [dice: 7d10 vs 6 -> 4 successes, +1 Willpower auto, 2 specialty rerolls]
